description: Calculation A: QEC threshold condition for noise amplitude A
basis: Ithier et al., PRB 72, 134519 (2005) - Eq.(21): 1/f noise dephasing
Krantz et al., APR 6, 021318 (2019) - t_gate = 50 ns
Fowler et al., PRA 86, 032324 (2012) - QEC threshold ~1%

result.interpretation: T_phi > 5.0 us requires A < 9.33e-14 rad/s. This is the noise amplitude upper bound for QEC threshold operation.

connection_to_d_TLS.reason: Conversion from A (rad/s) to d_TLS (Debye) requires Sarabi 2016 proportionality constant. Not yet obtained.

connection_to_de_Graaf_2018.conclusion: de Graaf 2018 removed TLS with desorption energy ~8600 ueV, while qubits at 15mK are affected by TLS with E < 1.3 ueV. This 6615x energy scale discrepancy is an open problem.

limitations: ln(omega_c/omega_ir) depends on cutoff frequency choice (typical values used)
D_lambda_z from Ithier 2005 is for quantronium qubit, not Au nanogap TLS
T_phi_min calculation assumes single dominant noise source
